auth.selectCityDescription: Please select the city where you want to play padel
auth.cityAutoDetectFailed: We couldn't detect your city automatically. Please try again in a moment.
auth.locationRationale: We need it to help you find games and clubs around you.
auth.noCityNearby: No city with clubs found near you.
auth.telegramInstructions: Click the link below to open Telegram and get your authentication code
auth.invalidCode: Invalid or expired code. Please try again
auth.telegramLinkRequiresLogin: Open this link from the Bandeja app while you are logged in (e.g. return to the app and use Open Bandeja again).
auth.telegramLinkWrongAccount: This link was started from another account. Open Profile → Link Telegram while logged into the account you want to link.
auth.byContinuing: By continuing, you agree to our
auth.mustAcceptEula: You must accept the Terms of Service to register
auth.firstNameRequired: First name or last name is required
auth.nameMinLength: At least one name must have at least 1 character
auth.phoneMinLength: Phone number must have at least 7 digits
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.genderAcknowledgmentRequired: You must acknowledge the gender preference
auth.eulaRequired: You must accept the Terms of Service
auth.appleSignInOnlyIOS: Apple Sign In is only available on iOS devices
auth.appleAccountAlreadyExists: User with this Apple account already exists
auth.googleAccountAlreadyExists: User with this Google account already exists
auth.appleAccountAlreadyLinked: Apple account is already linked to this profile
auth.googleAccountAlreadyLinked: Google account is already linked to this profile
auth.appleAccountAlreadyLinkedToAnotherUser: This Apple account is already linked to another account. If this is your account, please log in with Apple and link from that profile, or contact support for assistance.
auth.googleAccountAlreadyLinkedToAnotherUser: This Google account is already linked to another account. If this is your account, please log in with Google and link from that profile, or contact support for assistance.
auth.appleAccountNotLinked: Apple account is not linked to this profile
auth.googleAccountNotLinked: Google account is not linked to this profile
auth.cannotUnlinkLastAuthMethod: Cannot unlink your last authentication method. Please link another account first.
auth.emailAlreadyExistsUseLogin: An account with this email already exists. Please sign in with your other method and link this account in Profile.
auth.invalidIdentityToken: Invalid identity token: token must be a non-empty string
auth.appleTokenInvalidEmailFormat: Invalid Apple token: invalid email format
auth.appleTokenMalformed: Invalid Apple token: malformed token structure
auth.appleTokenInvalidSubject: Invalid Apple token: missing or invalid subject
auth.appleTokenInvalidExpiration: Invalid Apple token: missing or invalid expiration
auth.appleTokenInvalidIssuedAt: Invalid Apple token: missing or invalid issued at time
auth.appleTokenNonceMissing: Nonce validation failed: token does not contain nonce
auth.appleTokenNonceRequired: Nonce validation required: token contains nonce but none was provided
auth.signedInWithApple: You are signed in with Apple.
auth.appleAccountInfo: Your account information is managed by Apple Sign In and does not require additional input.
